final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original watercolor illustration of a Provençal lavender countryside scene in a quiet southern French small town.

Style/medium: transparent watercolor illustration, light and airy brushwork, luminous washes, in the tradition of European pastoral watercolor art — delicate layering, visible paper texture, no hard outlines
Composition: wide horizontal view, foreground farmer anchors the scene, winding gravel path leads the eye from foreground through lavender fields toward distant hilltop mill,柏树 rows frame the mid-ground, expansive sky occupies upper third
Subject: vast purple lavender fields stretching toward rolling hills; a straw-hatted elderly farmer working among the lavender rows; beside him a wooden handcart piled with bundles of harvested lavender; a winding gravel path flanked by tall cypress trees in a row; a stone-built ancient windmill on a distant hillside with an orange-tiled roof catching sunlight
Scene/backdrop: outskirts of a tranquil southern French Provençal town, open countryside, midday summer light, bright blue sky dotted with a few fluffy white clouds
Lighting/mood: warm, clear Mediterranean sunlight, soft diffused shadows across the lavender field, cheerful and romantic, warm healing atmosphere of French rural life
Color palette: translucent purple and violet as dominant field color, clear cerulean blue in sky, fresh greens for cypress and foliage, warm orange-terracotta accent on the mill roof — all four hues in harmonious balance with white paper breathing through the washes
Materials/textures: watercolor paper grain visible through transparent washes, soft wet-on-wet bloom edges in sky, dry-brush texture on gravel path and stone mill wall
Avoid: oil painting texture, heavy impasto, dark outlines, photorealistic rendering, digital airbrush smoothness, muddy colors, overworked washes
